title: phryne peyrousiana
intro: Phryne peyrousiana, also known as the Phryne or White Phryne, is a flowering plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions, due to its active compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids. Herbal preparations of Phryne peyrousiana can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
